qa_pairs.question: What is the endpoint for the New Arbutus Cloud Object Storage?
qa_pairs.answer: The endpoint for New Arbutus Cloud Object Storage is https://object-arbutus.alliancecan.ca.

qa_pairs.question: What is the endpoint for the Legacy Arbutus Cloud Object Storage?
qa_pairs.answer: The endpoint for Legacy Arbutus Cloud Object Storage is https://object-arbutus.cloud.computecanada.ca.

qa_pairs.question: What should users be cautious about when migrating object storage if they are using bucket ACLs?
qa_pairs.answer: Users should be cautious that most tools do not preserve bucket ACLs, so they will either need to ensure their chosen tool copies them correctly or recreate them in the new environment.

qa_pairs.question: Will user or project UUIDs remain the same when migrating to the New Arbutus Cloud?
qa_pairs.answer: No, user or project UUIDs will be different in the New Arbutus Cloud.
